description.value:
You release a loud shriek meant to draw attention or raise alarm. All enemies within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The targets are then temporarily immune to your Alarming Scream for 24 hours.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Deafened] for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes deafened for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 4}.
